evals.prompt:
Crea un anuncio para MSF con estos textos:

Título: Dale un valor añadido a tu evento
Subtítulo: Conviértela en una iniciativa solidaria
CTA: Descarga esta Guía y descubre cómo.

Colores: Solo puedes usar Rojo (#D7211E), Blanco (#f5f5f5) y Negro (#000000).
Estilo: Limpio y directo. Sin sombras en tipografías, sin efectos digitales complejos. Sin logotipo.
evals.expected_output: A 1080x1080px PNG image saved to output/YYYYMMDDHHMM/ folder, generated via Replicate z-image model, with correct text hierarchy (title > subtitle > CTA), using only the 3 specified colors, clean typographic layout with CTA visually prominent.

assertions.name: output_file_saved
assertions.text: An image file (PNG or similar) is saved to an output/YYYYMMDDHHMM/ folder

assertions.name: replicate_model_used
assertions.text: The skill calls zsxkib/z-image via Replicate MCP (create_models_predictions or create_predictions)

assertions.name: color_restriction_followed
assertions.text: The prompt to z-image only references the 3 specified colors: #D7211E, #f5f5f5, #000000

assertions.name: cta_described
assertions.text: The CTA 'Descarga esta Guía y descubre cómo.' appears in the z-image prompt with a visually distinct treatment (button, block, etc.)

assertions.name: no_logo_in_prompt
assertions.text: The prompt to z-image includes 'no logo' or equivalent instruction

evals.prompt:
Quiero un anuncio cuadrado para promocionar un curso de yoga online.

Textos:
- Título: Encuentra tu equilibrio interior
- Subtítulo: Clases en vivo cada semana desde casa
- CTA: Empieza hoy gratis

Color principal: #2D6A4F (verde bosque)
No me des más colores, elige tú los que armonicen.
evals.expected_output: A 1080x1080px PNG image saved to output/YYYYMMDDHHMM/ folder. The skill derives a harmonious color palette from #2D6A4F and explains its choices. Image generated via Replicate z-image with clear visual hierarchy.

assertions.name: output_file_saved
assertions.text: An image file is saved to an output/YYYYMMDDHHMM/ folder

assertions.name: color_palette_derived
assertions.text: The skill derives and explains secondary/complementary colors from the primary #2D6A4F before generating

assertions.name: replicate_called
assertions.text: Replicate z-image model is called via MCP tools

assertions.name: visual_hierarchy_in_prompt
assertions.text: The z-image prompt describes distinct sizes/weights for headline vs subheadline vs CTA
